title: dryopteris frondosa
intro: Dryopteris frondosa, also known as male fern, is a type of fern native to North America and Europe. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris frondosa include its ability to act as a purgative and a laxative, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat parasitic worm infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris frondosa is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it should be used with caution due to its potential side effects.
